directives: directive-1: Initialize Deep Sec Scanner and Install Dependencies
directive-2: Run Initial Deep Sec Project Scan
directive-3: Process Deep Sec Scan Findings with Language Model
directive-4: Generate Deep Sec Security Report
directive-5: Apply Security Fixes using Open Spec
directive-6: Revalidate Security Fixes with Deep Sec

findings.blockerRootCause: TNF monorepo size (174+ directories) causes deepsec scan to hang during file discovery phase

recommendation.immediate: Mark directives 2-6 as blocked:scan-timeout until scan infrastructure is optimized
optimization: Fill .deepsec/data/The-New-Fuse/INFO.md with actual project context (currently placeholder)
Configure scan exclusions for node_modules, .git, build artifacts
Run scan in --fast mode or target specific high-risk packages
Consider incremental scanning (packages/ first, then apps/)
